title: Useful Structures
description: Adds vanilla-like terrain features to the world that actually have a use!
body:
## FEATURES Adds 12 fallen birch and oak log types of length 4-6 in the ```minecraft:forest``` biome with iron or stone axes that can be obtained by left- or right-clicking, along with many other ways to obtain them.
Adds 6 Healing Fire variants (with random rotations), generating in the ```minecraft:taiga``` biome. The only difference between variants is the different amounts and locations of logs. Each fire will heal you by 1 HP (0.5 Hearts) every 3 seconds. Breaking the campfire will permanently remove its effect. The coarse dirt around the fire will not allow tree generation.
Adds the Desert Arena, generating in the ```minecraft:desert``` biome. It contains a barrel of loot, and even more if you're willing to uncover the loot hidden in the sand, but beware the monsters that arrive at night. ### FUTURE PLANS Rock and ore piles with pickaxes, along with other features, may be added **in the future**. ## VERSIONS Supports 1.21.5 - 26.1.2 ## COMPATIBILITY/BUGS As long as there are no packs with the same filenames, you should be fine. If there are any bugs, including floating "ghost" tools (survival causes should be fixed but may break with ```/kill```-ing certain entities), please report them (with steps to reproduce them) [here](https://discord.gg/Yhy9kQKzUA).
Uses repeating tick functions, I tried to make them optimized but may affect performance.
Bugs: * Floating logs may occur near the edge of hills or rivers. * Buttons may appear rotated the wrong direction, may be fixed later. * Some blocks (such as leaves), when generated in unexpected ways, may be replaced by structures.
